political.s: Via parent company Target: FEC: $47K PAC donations; 54% to Republican, 46% to Democratic committees.  [CA CalAccess + NY COELIG + TX Ethics adds state-level totals.]

labor.s: Via parent company Target: 177 federal penalties totaling $192.4M since 2000 (Violation Tracker).

charity.s: $230M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.21% of revenue) via Target Foundation.

environment.s: Via parent company Target: hazardous waste violation: $22.6M in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

dei.s: Via parent company Target: Rolled back major DEI programs in January 2025 — ended its three-year DEI goals and the REACH (Racial Equity Action and Change) initiative begun in 2020, withdrew from the Human Rights Campaign Corporate Equality Index, stopped tracking DEI hiring goals, and rebranded its Supplier Diversity program to “Supplier Engagement,” citing “an evolving external landscape” (CNBC, Jan 24 2025). Before the rollback Target was a long-standing DEI leader: HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2024), JUST Capital JUST 100 (#23 of the Russell 1000, 2024), and a Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #23 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture.

animals.s: Via parent company Target: Target sustainable-seafood policy developed with FishWise — covers MSC + ASC + Seafood Watch alignment. [FishWise partner]

guns.s: No federal firearms license on record for this company in the ATF FFL registry — no licensed firearms dealing or manufacturing.

privacy.s: Via parent company Target: 1 publicly-disclosed data breach per Have I Been Pwned (2013) — 70M accounts compromised. Most recent: Target (2013).

execPay.s: Via parent company Target: CEO-to-median-worker pay ratio 794:1 (median employee pay $58,269) — SEC proxy statement (DEF 14A, 2026).
